mapper.select: SELECT contract_id, chunk_id, clause_code, clause_title, clause_category, party_focus, risk_flag, source_section, text_for_embedding, related_amount_field, review_priority FROM clause_chunks WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} AND chunk_id = #{chunkId}

SELECT contract_id, chunk_id, clause_code, clause_title, clause_category, party_focus, risk_flag, source_section, text_for_embedding, related_amount_field, review_priority FROM clause_chunks WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} ORDER BY chunk_id
